title: Shield of Light mid roll receives normal damage

card.rawText: Roll 1 die prior to any damage the equipped creature receives. If the result is: 1-2: Heal for the damage instead. 3-4: Receive damage as normal. 5-6: Destroy this card.

effect.value: Roll 1 die prior to any damage the equipped creature receives. If the result is: 1-2: Heal for the damage instead. 3-4: Receive damage as normal. 5-6: Destroy this card.

plan.title: Shield of Light mid roll receives normal damage
plan.summary: Force Shield of Light 3-4 branch and verify damage applies normally.

forcedRolls.label: Shield of Light normal damage branch

notes: Read text first: Roll 1 die prior to any damage the equipped creature receives. If the result is: 1-2: Heal for the damage instead. 3-4: Receive damage as normal. 5-6: Destroy this card.

steps: Set up Shield of Light according to its printed text.
Force Shield of Light 3-4 branch and verify damage applies normally.
manualVerification: Confirm against printed text: Roll 1 die prior to any damage the equipped creature receives. If the result is: 1-2: Heal for the damage instead. 3-4: Receive damage as normal. 5-6: Destroy this card.
